description_long: This is a pair of high-top canvas sneakers in a vibrant red color, featuring white rubber soles and toe caps. The shoes have white laces threaded through metal eyelets, and a circular black-and-white star logo is prominently displayed on the outer ankle area of each shoe. The rubber soles show some signs of wear and dirt, suggesting regular use, while the canvas upper remains largely intact. The stitching is visible along the seams, adding to the classic, urban streetwear aesthetic. The interior appears to be lined with a dark fabric, likely for comfort and durability. These shoes are typical of casual, everyday footwear often seen in urban environments.
description: A pair of red high-top canvas sneakers with white rubber soles, white laces, and a black-and-white star logo on the ankle. The shoes show light wear, giving them a classic, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing both shoes, highlighting the red canvas, white laces, and the prominent star logo on the outer ankle.
description_view_1: Rear angled view displaying the back of the shoes, the high-top design, and the logo placement on the outer sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the outer sides of both shoes, with clear visibility of the star logo and the clean stitching.
description_view_3: Front view showing the lacing pattern, white toe caps, and the slightly worn appearance of the rubber soles.
attribute_logo: Circular black-and-white star logo on the outer ankle area of each shoe.
